rulings.Case Title: PAUL RATNER et al VS. 1314 POLK STREET ASSOCIATES, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, June 24, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT THE CHRIS JAMES CORPORATION DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled as to sixth cause of action only. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to third, fourth, fifth, seventh, and eighth causes of action. Plaintiff to allege specific misrepresentations made by this defendant to support fraud, negligent misrepresentation, and unfair business practices causes of action. Facts must be pled alleging what money defendant received and that it was not used accordingly or returned to support common counts causes of action. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, June 24, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT THE CHRIS JAMES CORPORATION MOTION TO STRIKE. Motion to strike granted with ten days leave to amend as to punitive damages only. Motion denied as to remaining issues. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: YAKOV KUSHNIRSKY VS. LEN TOLSTUNOV et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, June 24, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT VAN NESS ORAL SURGERY & IMPLANTOLOGY CENTER, LEN TOLSTUNOV, D.D.S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Motion to strike granted with fifteen days leave to amend. Plaintiff may not maintain separate and independent claims for general and professional negligence based upon the same conduct. See Flowers vs. Torrance Memorial Hospital Medical Center (1994) 8 Cal. 4th, 992. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ROSALIND RUSSELL VS. DEREK A. HALL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, June 24, 2009, line 20, DEFENDANT DEREK HALL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Motion sustained in part and overruled in part. Motion sustained without leave to amend as to three day notice to quit based upon habitual late payment, three day notice to cure or quit based upon habitual late payment, and all sixty day notices which are premature. Demurrer overruled as to three day notice to quit based upon subsequent tenant, and three day notice to cure or quit based upon subsequent tenant. =(302/CWW)
